meta_desc: Inflatable V tent with an elegant, modern design. Ideal for high-end events, weddings and receptions. Fully customisable.
intro_desc: Our V-shaped inflatable tents combine style and functionality to meet the needs of event professionals. These unique structures are ideal for creating attractive covered areas at outdoor events such as festivals, trade shows or advertising stands.
why_desc: At Hallucine, we offer inflatable tents that are lightweight, robust and easy to use. With over 30 years' experience in event equipment, we are committed to providing top-quality products tailored to your specific needs.
feat1: A modern shape that catches the eye and adds an original touch to your events.
feat2: Inflates in just a few minutes thanks to a built-in blower.
feat3: Airtight and durable materials, suitable for all weather conditions.
feat4: Perfect for reception areas, VIP areas or brand stands.
feat5: Add logos or specific colours to reflect your visual identity.
app1: Showcase your brand at trade fairs and events.
app2: Provide comfortable shelter for your guests.
app3: Set up VIP areas or refreshment points.
app4: Protect your equipment or create covered areas for your activities.
perf_desc: V Hallucine Inflatable Tents are innovative structures designed to deliver exceptional performance at your events. With high-quality materials and advanced technical features, these tents are ideal for trade fairs, exhibitions, outdoor events and more.
sizes_desc: Our Inflatable V Tents are available in three sizes to suit your needs:
sizes_note: Each model is designed to offer rapid assembly, great stability and superior durability, whatever the environment.
video_desc: Hallucine V-shaped inflatable tent assembly tutorial.
adv1_desc: Each V Inflatable Tent is lightweight, easy to transport and quick to set up thanks to an optimised inflation system.
adv2_desc: The Dacron-covered TPU bladder ensures maximum sturdiness while being easy to replace thanks to a zip fastener. This means you can quickly repair the bladders without having to replace the whole structure.
adv3_desc: Take advantage of digital printing on the roof of your tent. Whether for company logos or event graphics, your creations will be faithfully reproduced for maximum visibility.
adv4_title: Adaptable to all types of event
adv4_desc: The Inflatable Tent V can be used for professional, advertising or festive events thanks to its large capacity and outdoor stability.
schema_zoom: Click on the image to enlarge
tech1: The bladders that protect the inflatable are made from Dacron, an extremely hard-wearing fabric. Available in four colours (Red, White, Blue and Black), the collars can also be made from polyester to give you an even greater choice of colours.
tech2: The tent fabric is made from 350g/m² coated polyester, providing extra strength against the elements.
tech3: Eight colours are available, from orange to black, with screen or sublimation printing options.
tech4: Each coil has a pressure relief valve to ensure optimum safety during use.
tech5: We only use YKK fasteners, renowned for their strength and durability.
weight_desc: Weight of a 6×6m Inflatable Tent: approx. 34 kg, making it easy to handle without compromising sturdiness. Thanks to its well-designed structure, this tent is perfectly suited to temporary outdoor installations.
custom_desc: V Inflatable Tents are fully customisable to meet the unique requirements of your event. Whether you need a specific colour to match your brand identity or a custom design for extra visibility, we offer tailor-made solutions.
conclusion: The Hallucine V inflatable tent is the ideal option for your outdoor events. Its unique V-shaped design, exceptional strength and multiple customisation options make it a must-have choice for companies and event organisers.
